title: IT Act Section 65 – Tampering with computer source documents
content: Section 65 – Tampering with computer source documents. A person who intentionally conceals, destroys or alters any computer source code such as programmes, computer commands, design and layout, when it is required to be maintained by law, commits an offence and can be punished with imprisonment up to 3 years or fine up to 2 lakhs INR or both.

title: IT Act Section 66 – Using password of another person
content: Section 66 – Using password of another person. If a person fraudulently uses the password, digital signature or other unique identification of another person, he or she can face imprisonment up to 3 years or fine up to 1 lakh INR or both.

title: IT Act Section 66D – Cheating using computer resource
content: Section 66D – Cheating using computer resource. If a person cheats someone using a computer resource or communication device, the person may face imprisonment up to 3 years or fine up to 1 lakh INR or both.

title: IT Act Section 66E – Publishing private images of others
content: Section 66E – Publishing private images of others. If a person captures, transmits or publishes images of a person’s private parts without consent or knowledge, the person may face imprisonment up to 3 years or fine up to 2 lakhs INR or both.

title: IT Act Section 66F – Cyber terrorism
content: Section 66F – Acts of cyber terrorism. A person may face life imprisonment if he or she denies authorized access to a computer resource or attempts unauthorized access with intent to threaten the unity, integrity, security or sovereignty of India. This is a non-bailable offence.

title: IT Act Section 67 – Publishing child pornography or predating children online
content: Section 67 – Publishing child pornography or predating children online. If a person captures, publishes or transmits images of a child in a sexually explicit act or induces a person under 18 into a sexual act, punishment may be imprisonment up to 7 years or fine up to 10 lakhs INR or both.

title: IT Act Section 69 – Government power to block websites
content: Section 69 – Government power to block websites. The government may intercept, monitor or decrypt any information stored or transmitted in any computer resource in the interest of sovereignty and integrity of India. Under section 69A, the central government may block public access to information following legal procedure.

title: IT Act Section 43A – Data protection at corporate level
content: Section 43A – Data protection at corporate level. If a body corporate fails to implement reasonable security practices and causes wrongful loss or gain to any person, the company is liable to pay damages to the affected person.

title: Information Technology (Intermediary Guidelines and Digital Media Ethics Code) Amendment Rules 2026
content: Information Technology (Intermediary Guidelines and Digital Media Ethics Code) Amendment Rules, 2026. An Act to consolidate and amend the provisions relating to offences and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology.

title: Promotion and Regulation of Online Gaming Act 2025
content: Promotion and Regulation of Online Gaming Act, 2025. An Act to promote and regulate the online gaming sector including e-sports, educational games and social gaming; to provide for regulatory oversight; to prohibit illegal online money games; to protect users and maintain public order, financial integrity and national security. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice.

title: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita 2023 Offences Law
content: The Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023. An Act to consolidate and amend the provisions relating to offences and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs.

title: Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita 2023 Criminal Procedure
content: The Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023. An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to Criminal Procedure. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs.

title: Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam 2023 Evidence Law
content: The Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023. An Act to provide general rules and principles of evidence for fair trial. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs.

title: Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023
content: The Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023. An Act to provide for processing of digital personal data recognizing the right of individuals to protect personal data and enabling lawful processing. Ministry: Ministry of Communications.

title: Telecommunication Act 2023 Telecom Law
content: Telecommunication Act, 2023. An Act to amend and consolidate the law relating to development, expansion and operation of telecommunication services and networks and assignment of spectrum. Ministry: Ministry of Communications.

title: Jan Vishwas Act 2023 Decriminalisation Law
content: Jan Vishwas Act, 2023. An Act to amend certain enactments for decriminalising and rationalising offences to enhance trust-based governance and ease of doing business. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice.

title: IT Intermediary Guidelines Rules 2021
content: IT (Intermediary Guidelines and Digital Media Ethics Code) Rules, 2021. Rules issued under the Information Technology Act, 2000 defining responsibilities of intermediaries and digital media platforms. Ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology.

title: POCSO Act 2012 Child Protection Law
content: The Protection of Children from Sexual Offences (POCSO) Act, 2012. An Act to protect children from sexual assault, harassment and pornography and to provide for special courts. Ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development.

title: Prevention of Money Laundering Act 2002
content: The Prevention of Money-Laundering Act, 2002. An Act to prevent money laundering and provide for confiscation of property derived from illegal activities. Ministry: Ministry of Finance.

title: Information Technology Act 2000 Cyber Law
content: The Information Technology Act, 2000. An Act to provide legal recognition for electronic commerce, electronic records and digital signatures and to amend related laws. Ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology.

title: Indian Telegraph Act 1885 Telecom Law
content: The Indian Telegraph Act, 1885. An Act to amend the law relating to telegraphs in India. Ministry: Ministry of Communications.

title: Companies Act 2013 Corporate Law
content: The Companies Act, 2013. An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to companies. Ministry: Ministry of Corporate Affairs.

title: Reserve Bank of India Act 1934 Banking Law
content: The Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934. An Act relating to the regulation of banking and financial systems in India. Ministry: Ministry of Finance.

title: Bankers Books Evidence Act 1891 Evidence Law
content: The Bankers Books Evidence Act, 1891. An Act to amend the law of evidence with respect to bankers books and financial records. Ministry: Ministry of Finance.

title: TRAI Act 1997 Telecom Regulation
content: The Telecom Regulatory Authority of India Act, 1997. An Act to establish TRAI to regulate telecom services and protect consumer interests. Ministry: Ministry of Communications.
